text: You went sightseeing and shopping in the city.
You learned to ask for help and call for help.

My head hurts.
Call an ambulance!
I can travel safely on my own.
Good morning, Marlene! What do you want to do today?
I want to take a tour first. Then I would like to buy a dress.
Great plan! Are you feeling okay today?
I have a small headache. I will buy some medicine at the pharmacy.
Good idea. And if there is an emergency, call the front desk.
Thank you. I feel safe now. Let us go!
I want to visit the museum.
I have a headache.
Can you help me, please?
This is an emergency. Call for help!

Today was a long day, but a good day. In the morning, I went sightseeing. I took a tour of the city and visited a beautiful cathedral. I bought a ticket for the museum and saw a famous statue. In the afternoon, I went shopping for a new dress and tried on some shoes. The color was perfect, but I needed a bigger size. After lunch, I felt a little sick. I had a headache, so I went to a pharmacy and bought some medicine. The pharmacist was very kind. Now I feel much better. It was a full day, but I am happy and safe in my hotel room.

Hi Marlene, this is the front desk, Mister Costa. I am calling to check on you. I heard you felt sick this afternoon. Please remember, if you have a real emergency, call the front desk or the police any time. There is a hospital two blocks away. For a small problem, the pharmacy on the corner is open late. Do not worry about anything. Rest well tonight, drink water, and call me if you need help. Tomorrow is another beautiful day for sightseeing and shopping. Sleep well, and take care of yourself.

First, in the morning, you take a tour and visit the cathedral. Then you buy a ticket and see the famous statue. After that, you go shopping and try on a dress in your size. Next, you feel sick, so you buy medicine at the pharmacy. Finally, you rest in your hotel room, safe and happy.
